dailyQuote: March 16, 2026  Hebrews 11 : 40  God having provided some better thing for us, that they without us should not be made perfect.   Submitted by  Comments  Brother Kevin Blewett, 2020-05-17  There is another commission. Amen? There was a commission when Jesus sent out to the cities in twos, ‘Preach the Gospel. Cast out devils. Heal the sick.’ That was the first commission. Amen? I’m going to leave you standing for a second. That’s right. Because, amen, the Holy Spirit likes to… to… have a response. Amen. Then His last commission, as He went up, amen, He said, it was Mark 16, ‘Go into all the world. Preach the Gospel.’ Amen. Telling them to get baptised. Commanding them to be baptised in the Name of the Lord Jesus Christ. Amen?  And I want to take Brother Coleman’s words here, which Brother Mayeur brought, from “A Perfect Faith For A Perfect Rapture”, Tulsa, 4th July 1986.And he said: The last words that fell from His lips [he’s quoting the Prophet] until He comes again with a Shout and the Voice of the Archange
